mentions.note: Limited redemptions on flagship private credit fund treated as non-event by market; stock up 7.5%, best S&P performer; fear narrative around private credit redemptions fading.

Most money under management of any company on earth; emphasizing new fund types; large money repository results expected to be over pretty good number. May not be enough to outperform banks in sector.
Managing astounding $14 trillion in assets; blowout quarter with strong inflows; rallied on earnings beat and market leadership.

Stock -4% on $3.8B redemption news despite honoring requests (bullish signal); private credit funds solvent but narrative risk dominates; employees buying dip is positive; hold but upside capped in credit business.
CEO Jack Dorsey cut workforce 40% (10k→6k) for AI productivity; stock rallied low-50s to high-60s. Blueprint for Big Tech; expects mass AI-driven layoffs industry-wide.
Good private credit exposure if needed; Larry Fink stated oil could be cut in half post-war, bullish on solar long-term.
